description.value:
Garden World

Garden worlds are rare havens of natural beauty and relative calm, with less brutal industry and pressure than most Imperial worlds. Their people are often methodical, poised, and socially adept, shaped by cultures that value contemplation and emotional control. That tranquillity leaves a lasting mark, allowing them to recover from mental shock more quickly than most citizens of the Imperium.

Homeworld Bonus

+Fellowship, +Agility, -Toughness

Homeworld Aptitude

Social

Wounds

7+1d5

Fate Threshold

2 (Emperor's Blessing 4+)

Homeworld Trait

Serenity of the Green: A garden world character halves the duration, rounded up, of any result from the Shock or Mental Trauma tables and can remove Insanity points for 50 xp per point rather than the normal 100 xp.

specialAbilities.name: Serenity of the Green
specialAbilities.description: +10 bonus to Willpower tests to resist Fear caused by natural creatures and environments.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 4+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
